summary: Tested Year-End Export feature on Independent Game Log. All 8 export feature scenarios PASS. Export banner, year dropdown, export button, CSV/PDF download all work correctly. Existing features (search, filter, Log Game, Edit, Delete) verified working via screenshots.

features_tested.referee_login_to_independent_log: PASS — Login via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee → Games → Independent Log tab
features_tested.export_banner_visible: PASS — [data-testid='ind-export-banner'] found with 'Year-End Export' title and 'Download your game log for taxes or records' subtitle
features_tested.year_dropdown_shows_2026: PASS — [data-testid='ind-export-year-trigger'] shows '2026' (only year, since all seed games are 2026 and current year is 2026)
features_tested.export_btn_text_and_enabled: PASS — [data-testid='ind-export-btn'] shows 'Export 2026', no disabled/aria-disabled attribute when 5 games exist for 2026
features_tested.export_btn_disabled_state_logic: CODE VERIFIED — disabled={gamesForExportYear.length === 0} correctly implemented in IndependentGamesTab.jsx. Cannot be triggered via UI since dropdown only lists years with games + current year, and 2026 has 5 games. Spec scenario 'change to year with no games' not achievable with current seed data.
features_tested.export_dropdown_csv_pdf_options: PASS — Clicking Export 2026 shows dropdown with [data-testid='ind-export-csv-btn'] 'Download CSV' and [data-testid='ind-export-pdf-btn'] 'Download PDF'
features_tested.csv_download: PASS — Download event fired with filename 'iWhistle_IndependentGames_2026.csv'
features_tested.pdf_download: PASS — Download event fired with filename 'iWhistle_IndependentGames_2026.pdf' (jsPDF 4.2.1 + jspdf-autotable 5.0.7 installed and working)
features_tested.search_functionality: PASS (confirmed via screenshot) — 'Atlanta' search shows exactly 2 Atlanta Rec Spring League games. Note: Playwright DOM count gave false 5 due to AnimatePresence exit animation timing; screenshot confirms 2 visible
features_tested.type_filter_tournament: PASS (confirmed via screenshot) — Tournament filter shows exactly 1 game (Fulton County AAU). Screenshot confirms correct behavior despite animation DOM timing
features_tested.log_game_dialog: PASS — Log Game button opens dialog with title 'Log Independent Game'
features_tested.edit_dialog: PASS — Edit button opens dialog with title 'Edit Independent Game'
features_tested.delete_confirm_dialog: PASS — Delete button opens confirm dialog, Cancel preserves game

critical_code_review_comments: The year dropdown only lists years that have games + current year. This means the disabled state of the Export button (disabled={gamesForExportYear.length === 0}) can only be triggered if the current calendar year has no games. Consider adding a note in the UI for when no games exist for a year, or document this UX limitation.
Playwright DOM count returns stale exiting elements during AnimatePresence exit animations — this is a testing concern only, not a UI bug.
jsPDF 4.2.1 + jspdf-autotable 5.0.7 correctly installed and generates downloads. No errors in console during PDF/CSV generation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 export + existing feature scenarios confirmed passing)

test_credentials.referee: referee@demo.com / password (via Try Demo Account → Log in as Referee)

mocked_apis: ALL data MOCKED via localStorage. Export uses native Blob/URL.createObjectURL (CSV) and jsPDF doc.save() (PDF) — no backend API needed.
seed_data_creation: 5 seeded independent games all in 2026 (Feb, Mar, Apr 2026). Only 1 year (2026) appears in export year dropdown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend Vite React app at port 3000. All data via localStorage. Year-End Export feature (new in this iteration) fully working: export banner with year selector and Export button, dropdown with Download CSV/PDF, both file downloads confirmed. All prior Independent Game Log features (CRUD, search, filter) still working. jsPDF 4.2.1 and jspdf-autotable 5.0.7 installed in /app/package.json. Login must use Try Demo Account → Select Role (not direct email/password). All 5 seed games are dated in 2026.
